sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπάνω

- Transliteration: Epano

- Phonetic: ep-an'-o

- Definition:

1. above

a. of place

b. of number: more than

- Origin: from G1909 and G507

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G507; up above that is over or on (of place amount rank etc.): - above more than (up-) on over.
